race.comment: LADY GIOVANNA (5) is a Maiden galloper resuming from a spell after finishing fourth over 1000m at Orange at the latest appearance on February 9. Winner of a recent trial. Ready to open her account. KINGDOM HEART (4) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at Warren over 1000m after being in the firing line all the way. Should be handy in the run. Has the talent to take care of this field. AZUCAR (1) resumed over 800m at Narromine last start and finished 3 lengths away in sixth. Strips fitter and over further can improve. FINAL COAST (6) three-year-old Casino Prince filly on debut. Ran second in a Scone trial. Look for any market confidence.
